Skill Path: Anatomist

Your knowledge of the humanoid body is immense as is your drive to change it.

While developing your skills in Medicine you chose to focus specifically on Anatomist, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ws9JlysHcFoz6WAQ]{Forensic Acumen}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.QShgLWlfKYJO750P]{Stitch Flesh}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ws9JlysHcFoz6WAQ]{Forensic Acumen}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.QShgLWlfKYJO750P]{Stitch Flesh}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.9OaF7Lkrtvusg5AA]{Graft Technician}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.M6wJbWijFoOXJw8l]{Ingenious Grafting}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Kk4AMZtpQnLEgN0b]{Legendary Medic}
